ab: kalingun ti iku mazas tu bilu.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pencil.

ab: paliway ya ka isu.
en: I can lend you.

ab: kalingun ti iku mazas tu ipit.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: mai iku mazas qaya, qatiw pa ita Rasa.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.

ab: qanengi ita matiw meRasa tu bilu ni?
en: A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: kuwa ya, Rasa pama iku tu sasupasan.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: qanengi ita matiw meRasa tu saqanan taRbabi ni?
en: A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: mai iku qatiw, quman ti iku ta leppawan.
en: B: I'm not going, I've eaten at home.

ab: kalingun ti iku paRemaq tu qa’mayan.
en: A: I forgot to steam (hot) lunchboxes.

ab: qalazuk ka matiw paRemaq!
en: B: Hurry up and heat it up!

ab: kalingun ti iku mazas tu qa’mayan.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: nayau si qatapun pa ita qeman tu qa’mayan ku!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: qan pa isu tu niana tuttu?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: qan pa iku tu saqanan na taqsian tuttu.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: ngid isu qan tu niana tuttu?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: mazas iku tu qa’mayan setangi, qatapun pa ita qeman satuttu!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!

ab: qanengi ita matiw mawRat tu mali ni?
en: A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?

ab: nengi yu! ni qawi ita.
en: B: Okay! Let's go.

ab: qanengi ita matiw pemukun tu mali ni?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: qasukaw, taqsi pa iku.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: panmu iku mala tu sinap.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: kuwa, bula ka isu tu sinap zau.
en: B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: qanengi manmu timaikuan mala tu lawa ni?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: yau iku seminap, qeRas ika ti utay papanmu mala.
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, you ask Utay to help you.

ab: mulepun ti isu seminap ni?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: mulepun ti iku seminap.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: manna mai isu seminap?
en: A: Why don't you clean up?

ab: mulepun ti iku seminap.
en: B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: dasam tipan ta, supas ika qakikiya.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: kuwa, qatiw pa iku ala tu lawa.
en: B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: dasam ti dengat ’nay, supas ika qakikiya.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: ansita, mai pama iku mulepun seminap tu zau.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.

ab: antangi quni pa isu?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: qatiw pa iku kilim tu patudan.
en: B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: temanan temaqsi quni pa isu?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: qasulun pa iku tu kaput matiw satezay.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: temanan temaqsi quni pa aizipna?
en: A: What's he doing after school?

ab: qatiw pa aizipna nanguy.
en: B: He's going swimming.
